messages.content:
A pharmaceutical company is using blockchain to manage their supply chain. Some of their drugs must be stored at a lower temperature throughout transport so they installed RFID chips to record the temperature of the container.

Which other technology combined with blockchain would help the company in this situation?


Internet of Things (IoT)


Artificial Intelligence (AI)


Cloud Computing


Intelligent Apps
(Intelligent Applications)

Which statement describes data-sharing in a blockchain?


Organizations share only data related to money and finance.


Organizations share different versions of the same data on their local servers.


Organizations share separate versions of data.


Organizations share a single version of data.
Organizations share a single version of data in a blockchain.

Accenture is a founding member of ID 2020.

What is the focus of this alliance?


financial services


digital identity


supply chain


blockchain
The focus of the ID 2020 alliance is digital identity.

Blockchain is often associated with Bitcoin and the financial services industry. However, it is applicable to almost every industry. The term Multi-party Systems better describes how the blockchain system is used.

What is a benefit of a Multi-party System?


The system now owns the data and can share it as needed.


Organizations who participate must share data from the same location.


It can help businesses unlock the trapped value of their data.


More employees can be hired to process the data.
A benefit of a Multi-party System is that it can help businesses unlock the trapped value of their data.

A potential customer wants to find out how blockchain can benefit their company and why they should use Accenture’s Multi-party Systems practice.

Which factor describes the value of using Accenture’s Multi-party Systems practice?


a universal solution that fits all clients equally


Accenture’s technology and operational experience with blockchain


limited partnerships to keep ecosystems small and manageable


Accenture’s total number of employees worldwide
The value of using Accenture’s Multi-party Systems practice lies in Accenture's technology and operational experience with blockchain.

An e-commerce company is collaborating with artisans from all over the world to sell the artisans' products. Accenture is helping this client build a platform that will maintain the integrity of the artisans' credentials by creating digital identities for them. This creates a privacy-preserving link between the products and the artisan's unique identities.

How will these digital identities help these artisans?


by individually recognizing and rewarding them for using methods and materials that align with buyers’ values such as sustainability and labor practices


by allowing them to interact with the e-commerce company and getting details of the buyer so they can target to a specific audience


by linking them with the banks to prove credit-worthiness and informing them of loan options


by connecting them with the customers, enhancing their marketing, and building their client base

These digital identities will help the artisans by individually recognizing and rewarding them for using methods and materials that align with buyers’ values such as sustainability and labor practices.

hat is Accenture's role in Multi-party Systems?


consulting on new technologies for investment purposes


helping a single company develop a data ingress platform


helping ecosystems reimagine their processes to unlock value


developing a messaging solution between two companies

Accenture's role in Multi-party Systems is helping ecosystems reimagine their processes to unlock value. They work with multiple organizations within an ecosystem to create a blockchain solution that benefits all parties involved.

ccenture is helping a retail company increase efficiency in the management of customer transactions, payment processing, and answering customer queries using Machine Learning. The client uses blockchain technology to share data with their wholesale suppliers, delivery service providers, and customer organizations.

How would the client benefit by using blockchain technology to train the Machine Learning model?


Blockchain will ensure the automation process is faster than centralized databases.


Blockchain will ensure that the model training occurs on more consistent and timely data.


Blockchain will ensure the automated process can still be manipulated by a human.


Blockchain will ensure only admins can modify the data being sent to the Machine Learning model.

The client would benefit by using blockchain technology to train the Machine Learning model because blockchain will ensure that the model training occurs on more consistent and timely data. By using blockchain for data sharing, the client can ensure that the data being used to train the ML model is accurate, consistent, and up-to-date.

A record company is using blockchain to manage the ownership of their copyrighted content. The company requires that every time one of their songs is used for commercial purposes, all the parties involved in creating it receive a set percentage of a royalty fee.

How can a blockchain help track the royalty fees?


by creating a smart contract to calculate party royalties


by using consensus to determine royalties


by setting specific permissions for content usage


by granting regulators access to the blockchain

A blockchain can help track the royalty fees by creating a smart contract to calculate party royalties. Smart contracts can be designed to automatically calculate and distribute royalty fees to all of the involved parties based on pre-set rules, eliminating the need for manual tracking and calculations.

In 2019, an E. coli outbreak was traced from ground beef sold at a nationwide supermarket chain. This created fear in the consumers’ minds, leading to hesitation in consuming ground beef.

How might a Multi-party Systems strategy help prevent a similar situation from occurring in the future?


by allowing the source of tainted beef to be identified and prohibiting its sale


by halting the sale of all beef products regardless of source


by lowering the price of beef in the market to compensate for lost sales


by shutting down slaughterhouses for a certain period

A Multi-party Systems strategy could help prevent a similar situation from occurring in the future by allowing the source of tainted beef to be identified and prohibiting its sale. By implementing a blockchain solution that tracks the entire supply chain of beef, from farm to supermarket, it would be much easier to isolate the origin of tainted meat and remove it from the market quickly, preventing the spread of E. coli to consumers. Blockchain could also provide greater transparency and accountability throughout the supply chain, encouraging more responsible practices among stakeholders and reducing the risk of contamination.

Accenture has put together a coalition of several ecosystem partners to implement the principles of blockchain and Multi-party Systems using varying technologies. One group of partners is referred to as MAAG.

Which companies are included in the MAAG group?


MetLife, American Express, Alphabet Inc., General Electric


Morgan Stanley, Apple, Anheuser Busch, General Motors


Mitsubishi, Agricultural Bank of China, Apple, Goldman Sachs


Microsoft, Amazon, Alibaba, Google
The companies included in the MAAG (Mobility Open Blockchain Initiative) group are Mitsubishi, Agricultural Bank of China, Apple, and General Motors.
